title: One of Eric Dane’s Final Roles Was Boosting Visibility for ALS: “Used His Platform Not for Attention, But for Action”
summary: The 'Grey’s Anatomy' and 'Euphoria' actor died on Feb. 19 following a battle with the rare degenerative disease.

title: The ACA health coverage subsidy lapse hit 22 million people. Here are some of their stories
summary: The lapse of enhanced subsidies for Affordable Care Act marketplace insurance has forced families to make difficult financial choices.
